description:
Scan documents to PDF and other file types, as simply as possible.

NAPS2 is a document scanning application with a focus on simplicity and ease of use. Scan your documents from WIA- and TWAIN-compatible scanners, organize the pages as you like, and save them as PDF, TIFF, JPEG, PNG, and other file formats.
Requires .
NET Framework 4.0 or higher.
Changes in 8.1.0:
- Added the ability to pick a custom resolution
- Added email provider for "New Outlook"
- Improved "Keyboard Shortcuts" interface
- Fixed an issue with shared TWAIN scanners
- Fixed missing screen reader text for some buttons
- Fixed excessive Flatpak size
